extensions.description: Proof of Scientist (POSCI) is a 21M, fixed-supply, ERC20 with no owner, no mint, and no admin keys. The remaining 20M after a 0.5 ETH genesis sale is distributed by Bitcoin-style PoW mining: each successful keccak256(challenge || msg.sender || nonce) below the target mints a reward, halving every 10,000 rewards.
